title: Kingdom 1
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Kingdom 1''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. They were part of an attempt to wrestle out [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] from the ''[[Grey Wolf]]'' but all three were utterly destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-05-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire: Official Secrets & Solutions]]''
*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
